## Frozen S1 Original

The immutable original asks whether AI tutoring feedback improves learning.

## PKB-A Context Recall

The PKB contains feedback mechanisms, null results, methods, and data notes.

## Human-Approved Scope Card

Population: students. Intervention: AI tutoring feedback. Outcome: learning. Contrast: feedback quality.

Four relevant local evidence families were checked.

## Typed Relationship Ledger

P1 contradicts the simple average-effect claim and supports the mechanism contrast.

## Synthesis Claim Ledger

The novelty claim is bounded to a feedback-quality mechanism contrast.

## Integrated Literature Review

The nearest work estimates tutoring effects without identifying feedback quality as a mechanism.

## Nearest-Neighbor Matrix

P1 is nearest on population and intervention but differs in estimand and mechanism.

## Already-Done Memo

The broad average-effect study is already done; the mechanism contrast is not resolved.

## Researchability / Exogenous-Shock / Data-Path Triage

Administrative learning outcomes and randomized encouragement provide a feasible path.
